auth.login.subtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to continue
auth.register.subtitle: Create an account to get started
inventories.subheader: Browse the global registry of all shared and public inventories.
inventories.table.title: All Inventories
inventory.create.header.subtitle: Set up properties and access
inventory.create.generalSettings.title: Title
inventory.create.generalSettings.tags.pl: Type and press enter or comma to add a tags
inventory.create.customId.subHeading_1: You can set up items with inventory numbers in your preferred format.
inventory.create.customId.subHeading_2: To create a format, add new elements, edit them, drag to reorder, or drag elements out of the form to delete them.
inventory.create.customId.fixed.hint: A piece of unchanging text. E.g., you can use Unicode emoji.
inventory.create.customId.random.hint: A random value. E.g., you can format it as a six-digit decimal (D6) or 5-digit hex (X5).
inventory.create.customId.sequence.hint: A sequential index. E.g., you can format it with leading zeros (D4) or without them (D).
inventory.create.customId.datetime.hint: An item creation date and time. E.g., you can use an abbreviated day of the week (ddd).
inventory.create.customId.dragToMove: Drag to move up or down
inventory.create.customFields.heading: Fields Definition
inventory.create.accessSettings.publicIn: Allow any authenticated user to add items.
inventory.create.accessSettings.userWith: Type userId or email to add...
